---
title: "Educations & Travel Abroad"
---

Things to do: 
starting page: map with three points on
- Australia
- New Zealand
- Costa Rica 
→ idea is that it will open to each of these with their own zoomed in map with more pins and a better description 

**Australia**
Interactive map documenting all of the places I went to in australia and description of what I did in each place with photos 

**New Zealand**
Outline of my 12 day adventure
Take my itinerary and turn it into a sort of blog situation 
Including lists of hikes, where we ate and what hostel we stayed in 
Also have an interactive map of all of the places that I went to across the south island
